# omada_site_settings (Data Source)

Reads the current settings for the configured Omada site.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "omada_site_settings" "current" {}

output "mesh_enabled" {
  value = data.omada_site_settings.current.mesh_enable
}

output "fast_roaming_enabled" {
  value = data.omada_site_settings.current.fast_roaming_enable
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `advanced_feature_enable` (Boolean) Advanced features enabled.
- `ai_roaming_enable` (Boolean) AI roaming.
- `airtime_fairness_2g` (Boolean) Airtime fairness 2.4GHz.
- `airtime_fairness_5g` (Boolean) Airtime fairness 5GHz.
- `airtime_fairness_6g` (Boolean) Airtime fairness 6GHz.
- `alert_enable` (Boolean) Alerts enabled.
- `auto_upgrade_enable` (Boolean) Auto firmware upgrade.
- `band_steering_enable` (Boolean) Band steering.
- `band_steering_multi_band_mode` (Number) Multi-band steering mode.
- `device_account_username` (String) Device SSH username.
- `dual_band_11k_report_enable` (Boolean) Dual-band 11k reports.
- `fast_roaming_enable` (Boolean) 802.11r fast roaming.
- `force_disassociation_enable` (Boolean) Force disassociation.
- `id` (String) The site ID.
- `led_enable` (Boolean) AP LED enabled.
- `lldp_enable` (Boolean) LLDP enabled.
- `mesh_auto_failover` (Boolean) Mesh auto failover.
- `mesh_default_gateway` (Boolean) Mesh default gateway.
- `mesh_enable` (Boolean) Mesh networking enabled.
- `mesh_full_sector` (Boolean) Mesh full sector.
- `non_ping_pong_roaming_enable` (Boolean) Non-ping-pong roaming.
- `non_stick_roaming_enable` (Boolean) Non-sticky roaming.
- `region` (String) The site region.
- `remember_device_enable` (Boolean) Remember device.
- `remote_log_enable` (Boolean) Remote syslog enabled.
- `scenario` (String) The site scenario.
- `site_name` (String) The site display name.
- `speed_test_enable` (Boolean) Speed test enabled.
- `speed_test_interval` (Number) Speed test interval (minutes).
- `timezone` (String) The site timezone.
